title: lathyrus vestitus subsp. alefeldii
intro: Lathyrus vestitus subsp. alefeldii, also known as Alefeld's pea or wild pea, is a sub-species of the Lathyrus vestitus plant, which belongs to the pea family. It is a perennial plant that has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly due to its high content of isoleucine, a non-essential amino acid with antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lathyrus vestitus subsp. alefeldii include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and alleviate symptoms of certain diseases. Lathyrus vestitus subsp. alefeldii can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
